add/beyond the safe-integer edge rounds.reason: Perl IV arithmetic is 64-bit exact, not double-rounded

div/zero divisor yields Infinity.reason: Perl native / dies on a zero divisor

mod/remainder keeps the dividend sign.reason: Perl native % takes the divisor sign

mod/float remainder.reason: Perl native % truncates operands to integers

number/empty string coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: empty input must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

number/null coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: unset props must not silently zero downstream arithmetic

string/null renders as the string \"null.reason: deliberate: an unset prop must not surface a literal "null" in HTML

string/true renders as the string \"true.reason: Perl has no boolean type; template data carries 1/0

filter_truthy/the string \"0\" is truthy.reason: Perl truthiness treats the string "0" as false

sort/localeCompare orders case-insensiti.reason: cmp is byte order, not ICU collation

sort/relational compare on numeric strin.reason: the "auto" compare goes numeric when both keys look_like_number

reduce/numeric-string items concatenate.reason: numeric folds parse numeric strings instead of concatenating
